ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., smartphone, laptop) */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "cpu" TEXT /* CPU information of the device */,
  "memory" TEXT /* Memory information of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was purchased */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the device's warranty expires */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the device was checked for performance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., screen, WiFi, CPU) */,
  "component_type" INTEGER /* ID of the component type */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the component belongs to */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for each component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the component */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was purchased */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the component's warranty expires */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the component was checked for performance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "power_mode" TEXT /* Power mode of the component (e.g., high, low, medium) */,
  "initial_power_consumption" REAL /* Initial power consumption of the component */,
  "current_power_consumption" REAL /* Current power consumption of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_type FOREIGN KEY ("component_type") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the energy consumption belongs to */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the energy consumption period */,
  "end_time" REAL /* End time of the energy consumption period */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the energy consumption period */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption during the period */,
  "energy_unit" INTEGER /* ID of the energy unit */,
  "energy_source" TEXT /* Source of energy (e.g., battery, power outlet) */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during energy consumption (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_energy_unit FOREIGN KEY ("energy_unit") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the event belongs to */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "event_time" REAL /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  "event_duration" REAL /* Duration of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_events_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption pattern */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the energy consumption pattern belongs to */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the energy consumption pattern */,
  "end_time" REAL /* End time of the energy consumption pattern */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption during the pattern */,
  "pattern_description" TEXT /* Description of the energy consumption pattern */,
  "pattern_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the pattern (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_patterns_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_wise_energy_breakdown" (
  "breakdown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component-wise energy breakdown */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the energy breakdown belongs to */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the energy breakdown */,
  "end_time" REAL /* End time of the energy breakdown */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption during the breakdown */,
  "breakdown_description" TEXT /* Description of the energy breakdown */,
  "breakdown_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the breakdown (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breakdown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_wise_energy_breakdown_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_based_energy_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time-based energy analysis */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the energy analysis belongs to */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the energy analysis */,
  "end_time" REAL /* End time of the energy analysis */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption during the analysis */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the energy analysis */,
  "analysis_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the analysis (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_based_energy_analysis_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_time" REAL /* Time when the alert occurred */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" REAL /* Time when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the access request */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent component type (for hierarchical types) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "parent_event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent event type (for hierarchical types) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_types_parent_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit (e.g., Joules) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption threshold */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the threshold belongs to */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for energy consumption */,
  "threshold_description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  "threshold_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the threshold check (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_thresholds_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
